zh.lifeSummary: 當William Browne於1478年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞貝華斯時，他的父親William Browne37歲，母親Mary Malet41歲。他於1495年與Agnes Knight在英國英格蘭素瑞霍利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年在他的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When William Browne was born in 1478, in Betchworth, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Browne, was 37 and his mother, Mary Malet, was 41. He married Agnes Knight in 1495, in Horley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1557, in his hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Browne est né en 1478, à Betchworth, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Browne, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mary Malet, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Knight en 1495, à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1557, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: William Browneが1478年にイギリスイギリススリーベトチウオルスで生まれた時，父William Browneは37歳，母Mary Maletは41歳であった。1495年にイギリスイギリススリーホールリーでAgnes Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1557年に故郷で79歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Browne(이)가 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 베트ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Browne(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Malet(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 호를리에서 Agnes Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Browne родился в 1478 г. в местности бечворт, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Browne было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Malet, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Knight в 1495 г. в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1557 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия.
